diagnosis.differential_diagnosis: Coronary Artery Disease s/p CABG x1, Suspected postoperative Transient Ischemic Attack
diagnosis.diagnostic_reasoning: The patient presented with fatigue and a known history of heart murmur. A stress echo revealed severe aortic stenosis with a normal left ventricular ejection fraction (LVEF). Cardiac catheterization confirmed three-vessel coronary artery disease, leading to the decision for aortic valve replacement and coronary artery bypass grafting.
